title: Outlook Integration ("FROM' Should be based on the user activating the automation)
excerpt: I created a board and have invited multiple members. I have an automation that sends an email (using Outlook integration) when a status is changed to ‘YES’. Right now, regardless of which member changes the status to YES…

posts.author: jmifsud (Joseph Mifsud)
posts.cookedHtml: I created a board and have invited multiple members. I have an automation that sends an email (using Outlook integration) when a status is changed to ‘YES’. Right now, regardless of which member changes the status to YES, it appears as though the email is coming from me. I don’t want that. I want it based on which monday.com user is activating the automation. Is this possible?
